description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish Docs that runs on push to the ant-design-blazor/master branch. The workflow uses an ubuntu-latest job to check out the repository, set up .NET Core 3.1.300 and Node.js 10.x, then publish documentation to a site, deploy to GitHub Pages and Gitee, package and publish a nightly NuGet package, and sync the repository to Gitee.
